cost_elements.name: Main Conveyor Installation
cost_elements.description: Complete installation of main conveyor system including framing, motors, and controls

forecast.basis_of_estimate: Due to steel price increases in Q1 2026, material costs are running 10% above budget. Labor remains on track.

cost_elements.name: Secondary Conveyor Installation
cost_elements.description: Installation of secondary conveyor system with manual controls

forecast.basis_of_estimate: As planned. Installation progressing according to schedule with no cost overruns expected.

cost_elements.name: Main Panel Installation
cost_elements.description: Installation of main electrical panel including all breakers and wiring

forecast.basis_of_estimate: Volume discount achieved on panel purchase. Coming in under budget by $2,000.

cost_elements.name: Control System Programming
cost_elements.description: PLC programming and HMI development for conveyor control system

forecast.basis_of_estimate: Additional programming required for safety interlocks and emergency stop functionality. $5,000 over budget.

cost_registrations.description: Initial materials - conveyor framing steel and supports
Conveyor frame fabrication and motor installation
Main panel purchase with volume discount
Control system programming setup and initial configuration

progress_entries.notes: Main conveyor: Frame fabrication complete, motor installation in progress
Main conveyor: Motors installed, belt assembly in progress
Main conveyor: Belt assembly complete, testing and commissioning in progress
Secondary conveyor: Materials delivered, installation started
Secondary conveyor: Installation progressing well, on schedule
Main panel: Panel installed, wiring 50% complete
Main panel: Installation complete, final testing in progress
Control system: Initial setup and configuration started
Control system: Basic logic programming complete, working on safety interlocks

cost_events.name: Conveyor Belt Misalignment NCR
cost_events.description: During commissioning, the main conveyor belt was found to be misaligned by 12mm. Requires realignment of idler rollers and tension adjustment.

cost_events.name: Panel Incoming Inspection
cost_events.description: Routine incoming inspection of main electrical panel. All breakers tested, wiring continuity verified. One breaker found with loose terminal — corrected on site.

cost_events.name: Motor Warranty Claim - Excessive Vibration
cost_events.description: Main conveyor drive motor showing excessive vibration at 1500 RPM. Vendor notified — motor falls under 24-month warranty. Replacement motor shipped.

cost_events.name: Preventive Maintenance Training
cost_events.description: Conducted preventive maintenance training for conveyor operators covering belt tensioning, lubrication schedules, and safety protocols.

change_orders.title: Add Emergency Stop System to Conveyor Line
change_orders.description: Add dedicated emergency stop (E-stop) pull-wire switches along the entire conveyor line per updated safety standard ISO 13850. Includes additional PLC I/O modules, safety relay, and pull-wire hardware.
change_orders.justification: Client safety audit identified gap in emergency stop coverage for the main and secondary conveyor sections. Required for regulatory compliance before commissioning.

change_orders.title: Upgrade Secondary Conveyor to Variable Speed Drive
change_orders.description: Replace fixed-speed motor on secondary conveyor with variable frequency drive (VFD) to allow speed synchronization with the main conveyor. Includes VFD panel, cables, and commissioning.
change_orders.justification: Operational review determined that speed matching between main and secondary conveyors is needed to prevent product accumulation at transfer points. Approved by client project manager.
